costByParcel.title: Cost by parcel
costByParcel.note: Crop, inputs, labor, and other cost columns are omitted: no existing report exposes that per-parcel breakdown yet. This table totals activity costs grouped by parcel, while the Costs KPI totals per-cycle costs (including processing), so the two can differ.

activities.note: "Recorded by" is omitted: no existing report joins the activity author's name.
